title: Emergencies
description: Phrases you hope never to need: asking for help, finding a doctor, and explaining a problem.
situation: Urgent situations: calling for help, medical needs, lost items, and contacting the police.

phrases.tip: Say it loudly and clearly to get attention.

phrases.english: I need to go to the hospital

phrases.tip: Dard means pain. Point to where it hurts to be clear.
A woman says bhool gayi hoon.

phrases.native: नज़दीकी दवाई की दुकान कहाँ है?
phrases.transliteration: nazdeeki davaai ki dukaan kahaan hai?
phrases.pronunciation: nuz-DEE-kee duh-VAA-ee kee doo-KAAN kuh-HAAN hai
phrases.tip: Davaai ki dukaan means medicine shop or pharmacy.

phrases.native: मुझे अपने दूतावास से संपर्क करना है
phrases.transliteration: mujhe apne dootaavaas se sampark karna hai
phrases.english: I need to contact my embassy
phrases.pronunciation: MOO-jheh UP-neh doo-taa-VAAS seh SUM-park KAR-naa hai
